name: Project Genesis 2.0 (Tokenized Green Bond + Carbon Forwards)

issuer.name: HKMA + BIS Innovation Hub Hong Kong Centre + UNFCCC Climate Action

oracle.name: MRV (Measurement, Reporting, Verification) data from IoT sensors monitoring green project output

summary: Joint pilot by HKMA, BIS Innovation Hub Hong Kong, and UNFCCC Climate Action exploring tokenization of green bonds linked to project-level carbon credit forwards. Prototypes attach blockchain-tracked Mitigation Outcome Interests (MOIs) to green bond cashflows: if underlying green project generates verified emission reductions, MOI holders receive corresponding carbon credit forwards. Represents one of the earliest sovereign-level RWA pilots integrating climate finance with blockchain-native MRV. Key precedent for HK's broader Project Ensemble green/sustainable finance theme.

sources.title: BIS Innovation Hub: Project Genesis 2.0 final report (October 2022)
HKMA press release on Project Genesis 2.0

underlying_asset: Hypothetical green infrastructure projects (renewable energy, energy efficiency) with measurable emission reduction outcomes. Two prototype tokens: green bond and Mitigation Outcome Interest (MOI).
reserve_composition: Green bond backed by bond principal; MOI backed by carbon credit forward generated from verified project emission reductions.
secondary_market: Prototype only — not deployed in live secondary market.
oracle_provider: IoT sensors feeding MRV data to blockchain for automated MOI issuance upon verified emission reduction.
redemption_mechanism: Green bond pays interest + principal at maturity; MOI converts to carbon credit forward upon verified emission reduction milestone.
upgrade_authority: BIS + HKMA joint governance during pilot phase.

timeline.event: Project Genesis 1.0 prototype on tokenized green bonds released
Project Genesis 2.0 final report published; MOI concept introduced
Concepts feed into Project Ensemble Sandbox green finance theme
